goal: Make reading-history save failures diagnosable (#4 history not logging)
done: saveReadingRecord previously swallowed all errors (returned null silently). Now logReadingHistoryError() logs the readings/reading_cards insert error + catch error to console AND the window.__mtErrors ring buffer (so the in-app bug reporter attaches it). Surfaces the actual cause on next test — most likely a missing RLS INSERT policy on readings/reading_cards (the schema lives only in the Supabase dashboard, no migrations in repo).
verified: node --check passes; md5 parity canonical=www=ios. Diagnostic only — no behavior change to the happy path.
notes: #4 root cause still unconfirmed (need a logged-in test OR DB visibility). If next TestFlight test shows 'violates row-level security policy', fix = add authenticated INSERT/SELECT policies on readings + reading_cards.
